caption:
Anthropic has unveiled Claude Science, a product designed to enhance scientific research capabilities, similar to what Claude Code does for software engineering. This new tool is now available to all paid subscribers and aims to support drug development and computational biology. 3311f4a1

Will AI tools like Claude Science transform research in life sciences?

Sources: Technology Review, Bloomberg

#ClaudeScience #Anthropic #AI #LifeSciences #DrugDevelopment #Biotech #ComputationalBiology #Innovation #Technology

slides.headline: ANTHROPIC JUST UNVEILED CLAUDE SCIENCE FOR SCIENTIFIC RESEARCH
slides.sub: Here's the breakthrough for scientific research.
slides.image_prompt: A group of scientists at a conference, engaged in discussion, surrounded by modern technology and research materials.

slides.headline: CLAUDE SCIENCE IS NOW AVAILABLE TO ALL PAID SUBSCRIBERS
slides.sub: This full-featured product supports drug development and computational biology.
slides.image_prompt: Close-up of a researcher using a laptop in a lab, analyzing data with focused expression.

slides.headline: ANTHROPIC AIMS TO DEVELOP DRUGS FOR RARE DISEASES WITH CLAUDE SCIENCE
slides.sub: The company is serious about applying AI to the life sciences.
slides.image_prompt: A pharmaceutical lab with researchers collaborating on drug formulations, showcasing a vibrant work environment.

slides.sub: This product emphasizes AI’s role in enhancing human well-being.

slides.headline: ANTHROPIC IS POSITIONED TO LEAD IN AI FOR SCIENCE
slides.sub: This could reshape the landscape of scientific research.

story.title: Claude Science is Anthropic’s newest flagship product
